paragraphs: Without adequate Short Circuit Analysis in electrical systems, There is a risk of equipment overload which ultimately results in fire hazards. Most importantly, one faulty line results in cascading failures, which not only impact machines but also production lines. Also, failing to comply with safety regulations can lead to expensive legal penalties. Carelabs is an expert in preventing such risks, making it possible for companies to run efficiently and safely.
Electrical energy management systems are made simpler by Carelabs to ensure smooth functioning. We make your electricity system easy to understand, dependable, and controllable.

bulletLists: Our Services Arc Flash Study Short Circuit Analysis Relay Coordination Study Load Flow Analysis
Our Services Arc Flash Study Short Circuit Analysis Relay Coordination Study Load Flow Analysis

Comprehensive Electrical System Review : Professional electrical engineers at Care Lab s, conduct a thorough site survey to obtain essential system information such as the limits of the transformer, wire sizes, and safety settings.

Accurate ETAP Short Circuit Analysis : Through ETAP Short Circuit Analysis, Carelabs precisely calculates fault currents such as symmetrical short circuit analysis, ensuring the protection devices can deal with faults effectively.

Protective Device Coordination for Maximum Safety : Carelabs assures that protection devices such as circuit breakers, fuses, and relays function in an appropriate order. This step is crucial to prevent unnecessary power shutdowns and also to protect useful electrical equipment.

Regulatory Compliance & Risk Mitigation : Carelabs is compliant with IEEE, NFPA 70E, and Thai safety standards, allowing industries to meet necessary required safety standards while reducing liability risks.

Actionable Reports & customized Solutions : A thorough short circuit analysis report identifies potential threats in an electrical system. Additionally, it highlights risks of equipment damage and provides necessary measures to fix such issues.
